Node ,
Run a node at home.Over Protocol allows you to run a node on your PC, enabling you to experience a streamlined interface.
Home ,
Join home staking.Run a node and participate in home staking. Over Protocol is open to anyone who wants to contribute and earn Over.

Lifestyle .

Recap | The 2nd AMA
We are happy to announce the successful completion of our first testnet. We sincerely thank you for your active participation and feedback.
End of OBT Season 1
Thank you for joining us in Open Beta Testnet Season 1. It’s time to say good bye. We’re closing OBT Season 1 step by step.
